title: Bitou mayor attends indaba in Langebaan
description: WEST COAST NEWS - Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"WEST COAST NEWS - Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam attended the Minister's and Mayoral Forum in Mykonos, Langebaan on the West Coast on Tuesday 25 November.","html":"WEST COAST NEWS - Bitou Mayor Jessica Kamkam attended the Minister's and Mayoral Forum in Mykonos, Langebaan on the West Coast on Tuesday 25 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The forum received feedback on provincial and national engagements from the Western Cape MEC for local government, Anton Bredell."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Among other subjects covered were governance and service delivery, municipal readiness and co-ordination on energy, summer readiness and preparedness planning for fire safety, water demand management and traffic control and infrastructure readiness.","html":"Among other subjects covered were governance and service delivery, municipal readiness and co-ordination on energy, summer readiness and preparedness planning for fire safety, water demand management and traffic control and infrastructure readiness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With Kamkam is Victor Felton, Bitou Director of Engineering Services.","html":"With Kamkam is Victor Felton, Bitou Director of Engineering Services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Bitou mayor attends indaba in Langebaan
